faqs.name: FAQs

features.name: features
features.title: Unlock Unlimited Possibilities with AI Image
features.text: Our platform offers a wide range of features designed to enhance your image creation experience. From easy-to-use editing tools to powerful AI-powered image generation, we have everything you need to bring your ideas to life.

hero.title2: Transform your photos with the power of AI
hero.title3: From headshots to influencer photos, AI Image 's state-of-the-art technology ensures you always look your best. Create, edit, and generate images effortlessly.

price.title1: Choose the plan that fits your needs
price.title2: Choose an offordable plan that is packed with the best features for engaging your audience,createing customer loyalty and driving sales. engaging your

footer.title1: Image AI Inc. All rights reserved.

review.title3: Discover why thousands are choosing AI Image for effortless,high-quality photo generation, from LinkedIn headshots to vibrant social media content.

ready.title2: Join thousands of users who are already creating amazing AI-generated images.

modelTraining.title: Preset library
modelTraining.desc:
Save your usual style and generation settings to reuse on your next creation.
After you add reference images, the AI can continue in the same visual style.
Add image links or upload from your device—up to 16 reference images.
